title: Elytra texture cape but without cape
description: In this project, I will provide you with resource packs that have the textures of capes (without the need to have a cape) and if any new capes are added to the Minecraft world, I will create them as soon as possible.
body:
Some people, including myself, may not be able to use the cloak in-game for whatever reason, so I came up with the idea of ​​making the Elytra texture change without the need for the cloak....Using this resource pack, you can use the texture of this cloak for your Elytra....In the not too distant future I will be making Elytro textures from other capes as well, and if a new cape is released one day I will make a texture for it as soon as possible.Sorry if my skin didn't upload-A simple resourcepack that retextures the Elytra to look like a cape — even if you're not wearing one! Perfect for players who want that cape look without actually equipping a cape.
✨ No OptiFine required, works on vanilla
